song.title: Simplicity
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) We come in simplicity Longing for purity To worship You in Spirit and truth, Only You Lord, strip it all away Till only You remain We’re coming back to our first love, Only You
[C] Chorus You're the reason we sing, The reason we sing Yes, our hearts will sing How we love You And forever we'll sing, Forever we'll sing Yes, our hearts will sing How we love You
[V2] 2) We come with our broken song To You, the perfect One, To worship You in Spirit and truth, Only You Give us a child-like heart, Lead us to where You are We’re coming back to our first love, Only You [B] Bridge How we love You, how we love You, How we love You, our first love How we love You, how we love You, How we love You, our first love
[E] 1) We come in simplicity Longing for purity To worship You in Spirit and truth, only You Lord, strip it all away Till only You remain We’re coming back to our first love, Only You Chorus You're the reason we sing, The reason we sing Yes, our hearts will sing How we love You And forever we'll sing, forever we'll sing. Yes, our hearts will sing how we love You 2) We come with our broken song To You, the perfect One, To worship You in Spirit and truth, Only You Give us a child-like heart, Lead us to where You are. We’re coming back to our first love, Only You Bridge How we love You, how we love You, How we love You, our first love How we love You, how we love You, How we love You, our first love.
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C B C E
